title: Solar Power: Getting Started
content: Solar panels convert sunlight directly into electricity using photovoltaic cells. They produce most strongly near midday and fall to zero overnight.

title: Solar Technology Tier 2
content: Tier 2 solar tech improves panel efficiency and inverter control for stronger daytime generation.

title: Solar Technology Tier 3
content: Tier 3 upgrades improve heat tolerance and conversion efficiency in sunny biomes.

title: Solar Technology Tier 4
content: Tier 4 solar arrays add better tracking and maintenance automation.

title: Solar Technology Tier 5
content: Tier 5 introduces advanced cells with stronger low-angle light capture.

title: Solar Technology Tier 6
content: Tier 6 pushes conversion efficiency and durability in harsh climates.

title: Solar Technology Tier 7
content: Tier 7 arrays reduce losses and increase output consistency.

title: Solar Technology Tier 8
content: Tier 8 introduces premium materials and better thermal control.

title: Solar Technology Tier 9
content: Tier 9 adds highly optimized modules for elite solar performance.

title: Solar Technology Tier 10
content: Tier 10 delivers peak photovoltaic performance for top-tier clean energy output.

title: Solar Milestone: 25 Installed
content: Your first large solar field is online. This scale proves solar can anchor your grid.

title: Solar Milestone: 50 Installed
content: Solar deployment is accelerating. You now support broad daytime demand with clean output.

title: Solar Milestone: 75 Installed
content: A major solar network is established. Grid carbon pressure should begin to ease.

title: Solar Milestone: 100 Installed
content: You have built a massive solar backbone capable of powering whole regions.

content: Tier 9 advances materials and control intelligence for premium generation.

title: Wind Milestone: 75 Installed
